---
title: "project1check2"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Data import

```{r}
tuesdata <- tidytuesdayR::tt_load('2021-01-26')
tuesdata <- tidytuesdayR::tt_load(2021, week = 5)

plastics <- tuesdata$plastics
```

# Plastic summary / year function

```{r}
library(dplyr)

plastic_summary_by_year <- function(data, year_value) {
  data |>
    filter(year == year_value) |>
    summarise(
      pet = sum(pet, na.rm = TRUE),
      hdpe = sum(hdpe, na.rm = TRUE),
      ldpe = sum(ldpe, na.rm = TRUE),
      pp = sum(pp, na.rm = TRUE),
      ps = sum(ps, na.rm = TRUE),
      pvc = sum(pvc, na.rm = TRUE),
      other = sum(o, na.rm = TRUE)
    ) |>
    mutate(
      total = pet + hdpe + ldpe + pp + ps + pvc + other
    ) |>
    mutate(
      pet = pet / total,
      hdpe = hdpe / total,
      ldpe = ldpe / total,
      pp = pp / total,
      ps = ps / total,
      pvc = pvc / total,
      other = other / total,
      year = year_value
    )
}
```

# Example call

```{r}
plastic_summary_by_year(plastics, 2019) |>
  bind_rows(plastic_summary_by_year(plastics, 2020)) |>
  select(year, pet, hdpe, ldpe, pp, ps, pvc, other)
```
